allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/jobs' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Open roles we'\) { 'HERO: ok' } else { 'HERO: missing' }; if \($r.Content -match 'Senior Backend Engineer'\) { 'JOB1: ok' } else { 'JOB1: missing' }; if \($r.Content -match 'Engineering Manager'\) { 'JOB8: ok' } else { 'JOB8: missing' }; if \($r.Content -match 'Submit your CV'\) { 'CTA: ok' } else { 'CTA: missing' } } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Open roles'\) { 'NAV: ok' } else { 'NAV: missing' } } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Port 3000 still in use by PID\(s\): $\($conn.OwningProcess -join ', '\)" } else { "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://my-app.shinsenna2023.workers.dev/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "/   STATUS: $\($r1.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r1.Content.Length\)" } catch { "/   ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://my-app.shinsenna2023.workers.dev/jobs' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "/jobs STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r2.Content.Length\)"; if \($r2.Content -match 'Senior Backend Engineer'\) { '/jobs CONTENT: ok' } else { '/jobs CONTENT: missing job listings' } } catch { "/jobs ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:8787/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\) LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'Apex Talent'\) { 'CONTENT: ok' } else { 'CONTENT: unexpected' } } catch { "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import re,io; [print\(i,repr\(l.strip\(\)[:200]\)\) for i,l in enumerate\(io.open\('sign-letter.html',encoding='utf-8'\),1\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)]")

Bash(python -c "import re,io; out=io.open\('/tmp/ja_lines.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'\); [out.write\(f'{i}\\t{l.rstrip\(\)}\\n'\) for i,l in enumerate\(io.open\('supercs999.html',encoding='utf-8'\),1\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)]; out.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "import re,io; print\(sum\(1 for l in io.open\('superadmin999.html',encoding='utf-8'\) if re.search\('[぀-ヿ一-龯]', l\)\)\)")

Bash(git commit -m 'ui\(summary\): remove the 3 quick-stat tiles \(stops / walking / spend\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(wallet\): retention buffer releases after N completed sets \(was: first payout\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(dashboard\): set progress uses real plan count, not hardcoded 15 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(payout\): withdraw-all — lock amount to full available, no partials *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(summary\): transport labels reflect the real mode + day-form terminology *)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:',len\(d\)\); [print\(r\) for r in d]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total plans:',len\(d\)\); assigned=[p for p in d if p['planner_id']]; print\('assigned \(planner_id set\):',len\(assigned\)\); snap=[p for p in d if p['arrival_date_snapshot']]; print\('with snapshot:',len\(snap\)\); sd=[p for p in d if p['start_date']]; print\('with start_date set:',len\(sd\)\); ed=[p for p in d if p['end_date']]; print\('with end_date set:',len\(ed\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(sorted\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if d else 'no rows'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(sorted\(d[0].keys\(\)\) if d else 'EMPTY TABLE'\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node,wrangler,vite,npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='Mem\(MB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/user/my-app/support.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/const SUP_I18N = \(\\{[\\s\\S]*?\\n\\}\)\\nlet SUP_LANG/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('REGEX NO MATCH'\);process.exit\(1\);}try{const o=eval\('\('+m[1]+'\)'\);console.log\('PARSED OK. en keys:',Object.keys\(o.en\).length,'ja keys:',Object.keys\(o.ja\).length\);console.log\('prefill.bond ends-space:',JSON.stringify\(o.ja['prefill.bond'].slice\(-2\)\)\);console.log\('prefill.ext ends:',JSON.stringify\(o.ja['prefill.ext'].slice\(-2\)\)\);console.log\('prefill.bug ends:',JSON.stringify\(o.ja['prefill.bug'].slice\(-2\)\)\);console.log\('sample a1:',o.ja['sup.faq.a1'].slice\(0,20\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('PARSE FAIL:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);let s=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/user/my-app/support.html','utf8'\).replace\(/\\r/g,''\);const start=s.indexOf\('const SUP_I18N = '\);const letIdx=s.indexOf\('let SUP_LANG',start\);const seg=s.slice\(start+'const SUP_I18N = '.length,letIdx\).trim\(\);try{const o=eval\('\('+seg+'\)'\);console.log\('PARSED OK. en keys:',Object.keys\(o.en\).length,'ja keys:',Object.keys\(o.ja\).length\);console.log\('prefill.bond ends:',JSON.stringify\(o.ja['prefill.bond'].slice\(-3\)\)\);console.log\('prefill.ext ends:',JSON.stringify\(o.ja['prefill.ext'].slice\(-3\)\)\);console.log\('prefill.bug ends:',JSON.stringify\(o.ja['prefill.bug'].slice\(-3\)\)\);console.log\('en==ja key parity:',JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(o.en\).sort\(\)\)===JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(o.ja\).sort\(\)\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('PARSE FAIL:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('supercs999.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/const QUICK_REPLIES_DEFAULTS = \(\\{[\\s\\S]*?\\n\\}\)\\n/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('NO MATCH'\);process.exit\(1\);}const obj=eval\('\('+m[1]+'\)'\);console.log\('en len',obj.en.length,'ja len',obj.ja.length\);console.log\('ja emojis ok:',obj.ja.every\(c=>/^\\W/.test\(c.label\)\)\);console.log\('ja placeholders chip5 has pending_amt:',obj.ja[4].text.includes\('{pending_amt}'\)&&obj.ja[4].text.includes\('¥'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('privacy.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/const TM_I18N = \\{[\\s\\S]*?\\n\\}\\n/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('NO MATCH'\);process.exit\(1\);}try{eval\('\('+m[0].replace\('const TM_I18N = ',''\)+'\)'\);console.log\('JS OBJECT VALID'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('SYNTAX ERROR:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const costTxt = '¥1,500'; const costMatch = costTxt.match\(/\([0-9,]+\(?:\\.\\d+\)?\)/\); console.log\('Match:', costMatch[1], 'Parsed:', parseFloat\(costMatch[1].replace\(/,/g, ''\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);try{const h=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/user/my-app/superadmin999.html','utf8'\);const jp=\(h.match\(/[぀-ヿ一-鿿]/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('superadmin999.html JP chars:',jp\);const dt=\(h.match\(/\\bdt\\\(/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('dt\(\) calls:',dt\);const comm=\(h.match\(/コミッション/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('コミッション:',comm\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('no superadmin999.html:',e.message\)}")
Bash(Select-String -Pattern "parse|コミッション|でで|〜|J/2N|ブリーフ|units")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);['login.html','apply.html','signup.html','forgot.html','reset.html'].forEach\(f=>{try{const h=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/user/my-app/'+f,'utf8'\);const ja=\(h.match\(/[぀-ヿ一-鿿]/g\)||[]\).length;const fr=\(h.match\(/connexion|inscription|mot de passe|votre|bonjour|français|continuer|adresse/gi\)||[]\).length;const en=\(h.match\(/\\b\(login|sign up|password|email|continue|apply\)\\b/gi\)||[]\).length;console.log\(f.padEnd\(12\),'JP='+ja,'FR='+fr,'EN='+en\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(f,'—',e.code\)}}\)")
